report.summary: Community growth cycle v21 (Mar 16): calendar audit surfaced three gaps (Fri Mar 20, Sun Mar 22, Mon Mar 30) — filled with Solana vs Ethereum 2026, MEV Guide 2026, and Crypto Gaming 2026 threads; Apr 2 newsletter drafted; social card created (social-solana-vs-ethereum-2026.svg).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Fri Mar 20 — Twitter thread (6 posts): Solana vs Ethereum 2026 — post-Fusaka/post-Alpenglow comparison: TPS (65K vs 4K L2), fees ($0.001 vs $0.003), TVL ($12B vs $85B), dev growth (3,400 +42% YoY vs 7,200), ETF status (SOL filing vs ETH $28B live); CTA to /learn/solana-vs-ethereum-2026
Fri Mar 20 — Discord/Telegram: Solana vs Ethereum 2026 guide drop announcement

Sun Mar 22 — Twitter thread (5 posts): MEV Guide 2026 — $1.5B extracted lifetime, 3 attack types (sandwich, front-running, liquidation sniping), 2026 scale ($3–8M/day ETH), 5 protection tools (Flashbots Protect, MEV Blocker, 1inch Fusion, CoW Protocol, private mempool), Glamsterdam ePBS fix roadmap; CTA to /learn/mev-guide-2026
Sun Mar 22 — Discord/Telegram: MEV guide Sunday reading announcement

Mon Mar 30 — Twitter thread (5 posts): Crypto Gaming 2026 — P2E is dead, 'own don't earn' model, DeFAI x gaming (Parallel AI TCG, AI guild managers), infrastructure (Immutable X 350M+ NFTs, Ronin 3M DAU, Arbitrum Gaming $180M TVL), what's working (Gods Unchained, Pixels, Off The Grid); CTA to /learn/crypto-gaming-2026-guide
Mon Mar 30 — Discord/Telegram: Crypto Gaming 2026 week opener announcement

Thu Apr 2 — Full newsletter (week of Mar 30): market pulse (BTC $95K+ post-FOMC, Pectra in 8 days, DeFi options ATH $4.2B notional), 3 new page highlights (SOL vs ETH, MEV guide, crypto gaming), 2 worth-reading picks (ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap, defi-options-trading-guide), Degen Corner (MEV bots during FOMC vol spike — protection tools reminder)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-solana-vs-ethereum-2026.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark glass-morphism theme; brand gradient title ('Solana vs Ethereum'); left panel (ETH + L2s): indigo accent, 4 metric rows (TPS 1K–4K, fees $0.001–$0.003, TVL $85B+, 7,200 devs), ETH ETF $28B AUM badge, 'DeFi · Institutional · Security' tag; right panel (Solana): cyan accent, 4 metric rows (TPS 65K, fees <$0.001, TVL $12B, 3,400 devs +42% YoY), SOL ETF filing badge, 'Consumer · Payments · Speed' tag; VS divider circle center; TVL proportion bars; bottom data attribution bar. Saved to /public/social-solana-vs-ethereum-2026.svg

sections.title: Calendar Audit Results
items: Full audit of v17–v20 calendar coverage: Mar 16–27 now complete with v21 additions
Gap closed: Fri Mar 20 — Solana vs Ethereum 2026 (strong weekend comparison content, follows v20 Ethereum roadmap thread naturally)
Gap closed: Sun Mar 22 — MEV Guide 2026 (Sunday technical deep-dive, contextualises Glamsterdam ePBS coverage from v20 Ethereum thread)
Gap opened and filled: Mon Mar 30 week opener — Crypto Gaming 2026 (DeFAI x gaming narrative, no prior amplification, strong Q2 2026 content angle)
Apr 2 newsletter drafted — consolidates v21 new pages with post-FOMC market recap and Pectra countdown (8 days)
Solana vs Ethereum 2026 social card saved to /public/social-solana-vs-ethereum-2026.svg
